name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
In stock!!️
Dior Montaigne chain Montaigne large✔️ Dior's classic Damier series is absolutely amazing. The Damier element is the most worth buying right now; every style has a unique vibe. Montaigne is a classic, with a minimalist, high-end design. The large CD lock is very versatile. The adjustable strap looks great as a shoulder bag, crossbody, or clutch. Highly recommended♡
Size;25x16.5x8cm
